                                                                        "textAlign": "left"
                                                                    }
                                                                },

                                                                "captionBar": false,

                                                                },
                                                                "text": "1. Select the data model: In the left top part of the tree, select IO or ISA95 Model.",

                                                            },

                                                                        "textAlign": "left"

                                                                },

                                                                        "border": "0px",

                                                                "captionBar": false,
                                                                "id": "action4_2_💾 Export button",
                                                                "layout": {
                                                                    "h": 5,
                                                                    "static": true,
                                                                    "w": 59,
                                                                    "x": 6,
                                                                    "y": 155.5
                                                                },
                                                                "options": {
                                                                    "style": {
                                                                        "backgroundColor": "transparent",
                                                                        "border": "0px",
                                                                        "color": "black",

                                                            {

                                                                "layout": {
                                                                    "h": 5,
                                                                    "static": true,
                                                                    "w": 59,
                                                                    "x": 6,
                                                                    "y": 160.5
                                                                },
                                                                "options": {
                                                                    "style": {
                                                                        "backgroundColor": "transparent",
                                                                        "border": "0px",
                                                                        "color": "black",
                                                                        "fontSize": "min(2vh, 13px)",
                                                                        "fontWeight": "normal",
                                                                        "textAlign": "left"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "text": "⚠️Attention: Loading big amounts of data could take time or even collaps the visualization. Be cautious.",

                                                                    "h": 4,

                                            ],

                        "type": "tabs"

    "info": {
        "favicon": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,",
        "title": "Process Metrics Mirror"
    },
    "name": "bch-pmm-app",
    "options": {
        "background": {
            "style": {
                "backgroundColor": "white",
                "backgroundSize": "contain"
            }
        },
        "margin": {
            "x": 0,
            "y": 0
        },
        "numberOfColumns": 96,
        "numberOfRows": {
            "type": "count",
            "value": 96
        },
        "padding": {
            "x": 0,
            "y": 0
        },
        "spacing": {
            "x": 0,
            "y": 0
        },
        "stacking": "none",
        "theme": "light"
    },
    "rootOnly": {
        "appBar": {
            "center": {
                "defaultTools": {
                    "hidden": false
                },
                "toolsOrder": []
            },
            "left": {
                "defaultTools": {
                    "hidden": true
                },
                "toolsOrder": [
                    "logoBayer",
                    "pageName",
                    "spacer",
                    "userGuide"
                ]
            },
            "right": {
                "toolsOrder": [
                    "restricted",
                    "spacer",
                    "envName"
                ]
            },
            "style": {
                "background": "-webkit-linear-gradient(-18deg, #FFFFFF 50%, #7C84C2 50%,  #34B4E4 83%, #60C5EB 100%)",
                "border": "1px solid #EDEDED",
                "borderTop": "0px solid transparent",
                "height": "48px"
            },
            "tools": {
                "envName": {
                    "style": {
                        "color": "black",
                        "fontSize": "16px",
                        "fontWeight": "bold"
                    },
                    "title": "Dev",
                    "type": "label"
                },
                "logoBayer": {
                    "icon": {
                        "icon": {
                            "base64": "",
                            "mimeType": "image/svg+xml"
                        },
                        "style": {
                            "height": "33px",
                            "width": "33px"
                        }
                    },
                    "style": {
                        "opacity": 1
                    },
                    "type": "label"
                },
                "pageName": {
                    "style": {
                        "color": "#16364e",
                        "fontSize": "16px",
                        "fontWeight": "bold",
                        "height": "48px",
                        "opacity": 1
                    },
                    "title": "Process Metrics Mirror",
                    "type": "label"
                },
                "restricted": {
                    "style": {
                        "color": "white",
                        "fontSize": "12px",
                        "fontWeight": "normal"
                    },
                    "title": "RESTRICTED",
                    "type": "label"
                },
                "spacer": {
                    "style": {
                        "height": "48px",
                        "opacity": 1
                    },
                    "type": "spacer"
                },
                "userGuide": {
                    "actions": {
                        "onClick": {
                            "name": "getUserGuidePrompt",
                            "type": "action"
                        }
                    },
                    "disabled": false,
                    "icon": {
                        "icon": {
                            "base64": "",
                            "mimeType": "image/png"
                        },
                        "style": {
                            "background": "#76BA24",
                            "borderRadius": "8.5px",
                            "box-shadow": "rgba(45, 35, 66, .2) 0 1px 2px, rgba(45, 35, 66, .15) 0 4px 10px -2px, rgba(58, 65, 111, .25) 0 -2px 0 inset",
                            "height": "30px",
                            "opacity": 1,
                            "width": "140px"
                        }
                    },
                    "type": "button"
                }
            }
        }
    },
    "version": "1",
    "widgets": [
        {
            "actions": {
                "didUpdate": false
            },
            "captionBar": false,
            "id": "tabsID",
            "layout": {
                "h": 96,
                "static": true,
                "w": 96,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 0
            },
            "options": {
                "indicator": {
                    "selector": {
                        "line": {
                            "alignment": "bottom",
                            "color": {
                                "dark": "#9FCF66",
                                "light": "#9FCF66"
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "style": {
                        "color": "white",
                        "fontSize": "13px",
                        "height": "40px",
                        "minWidth": "100px"
                    }
                },
                "showTabBar": false,
                "style": {
                    "border": "none"
                },
                "tabAlignment": "top",
                "tabBar": {
                    "style": {
                        "backgroundColor": "#51596D",
                        "color": "white"
                    }
                }
            },
            "tabs": [
                {
                    "compilation": {
                        "actions": {
                            "disableButton": [
                                {
                                    "id": "submitFormID",
                                    "set": [
                                        {
                                            "name": "model.disabled",
                                            "value": true
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "type": "modify"
                                }
                            ],
                            "enableButton": [
                                {
                                    "id": "submitFormID",
                                    "set": [
                                        {
                                            "name": "model.disabled",
                                            "value": false
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "type": "modify"
                                }
                            ],
                            "updateTab": [
                                {
                                    "from": "startdateFormID",
                                    "key": "startDate",
                                    "type": "collect"
                                },
                                {
                                    "from": "enddateFormID",
                                    "key": "endDate",
                                    "type": "collect"
                                },
                                {
                                    "from": "aggregateFormID",
                                    "key": "aggregation",
                                    "type": "collect"
                                },
                                {
                                    "from": "selectedTableID",
                                    "key": "tagsOnSelectedTable",
                                    "type": "collect"
                                },
                                {
                                    "aggregateOne": [
                                        {
                                            "$project": {
                                                "aggregation": "$aggregation.aggregation",
                                                "endDate": "$endDate.endDate",
                                                "startDate": "$startDate.startDate",
                                                "tags": "$tagsOnSelectedTable"
                                            }
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "type": "transform"
                                },
                                {
                                    "id": "self",
                                    "set": [
                                        {
                                            "name": "payload.activetab",
                                            "value": "$model.state.activeTabId"
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "type": "modify"
                                },
                                {
                                    "case": [
                                        {
                                            "action": {
                                                "id": "self",
                                                "set": [
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "payload.chartPens",
                                                        "value": "$model.tabs.1.compilation.widgets.0.chart.pens"
                                                    },
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "payload.chartYAxis",
                                                        "value": "$model.tabs.1.compilation.widgets.0.chart.y_axis"
                                                    }
                                                ],
                                                "type": "modify"
                                            },
                                            "match": {
                                                "activetab": "chartTab"
                                            }
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "type": "switch"
                                },
                                {
                                    "ctx": "/System/Core/_Global Core Logic/UseCases/Global Core Projects/PMM",
                                    "func": "UpdateTabCompilation",
                                    "lib": "bch-pmm-app",
                                    "type": "function"
                                },
                                {
                                    "case": [
                                        {
                                            "action": [
                                                {
                                                    "name": "disableButton",
                                                    "type": "action"
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    "id": "self",
                                                    "set": [
                                                        {
                                                            "name": "model.tabs.0.compilation",
                                                            "value": "$payload.grid"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "type": "modify"
                                                }
                                            ],
                                            "match": {
                                                "activetab": "faceplateTab"
                                            }
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "action": [
                                                {
                                                    "name": "enableButton",
                                                    "type": "action"
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    "id": "self",
                                                    "set": [
                                                        {
                                                            "name": "model.tabs.1.compilation",
                                                            "value": "$payload.grid"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "type": "modify"
                                                }
                                            ],
                                            "match": {
                                                "activetab": "chartTab"
                                            }
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "action": [
                                                {
                                                    "name": "enableButton",
                                                    "type": "action"
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    "id": "self",
                                                    "set": [
                                                        {
                                                            "name": "model.tabs.2.compilation",
                                                            "value": "$payload.grid"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "type": "modify"
                                                }
                                            ],
                                            "match": {
                                                "activetab": "tableTab"
                                            }
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "type": "switch"
                                }
                            ]
                        },
                        "options": {
                            "background": {
                                "style": {
                                    "backgroundColor": "#f0edf0",
                                    "backgroundSize": "contain"
                                }
                            },
                            "margin": {
                                "x": 0,
                                "y": 0
                            },
                            "numberOfColumns": 96,
                            "numberOfRows": {
                                "type": "count",
                                "value": 96
                            },
                            "padding": {
                                "x": 0,
                                "y": 0
                            },
                            "spacing": {
                                "x": 0,
                                "y": 0
                            },
                            "stacking": "none",
                            "theme": "light"
                        },
                        "version": "1",
                        "widgets": [
                            {
                                "actions": {
                                    "onSelect": [
                                        {
                                            "from": "selectedTableID",
                                            "key": "tagsonselectedtable",
                                            "type": "collect"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "ctx": "/System/Core/_Global Core Logic/UseCases/Global Core Projects/PMM",
                                            "func": "CheckTransformModelIDsToPath",
                                            "lib": "bch-pmm-app",
                                            "type": "function"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "case": [
                                                {
                                                    "action": [
                                                        {
                                                            "addToArray": [
                                                                {
                                                                    "name": "model.data",
                                                                    "value": "$payload"
                                                                }
                                                            ],
                                                            "id": "selectedTableID",
                                                            "type": "modify"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "id": "tabsID",
                                                            "type": "refresh"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "match": {
                                                        "tag": "new"
                                                    }
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    "action": [
                                                        {
                                                            "duration": 300,
                                                            "title": "Object is not valid ⛔",
                                                            "type": "notify"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "match": {
                                                        "tag": "notvalid"
                                                    }
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    "action": [
                                                        {
                                                            "duration": 300,
                                                            "title": "Object is already in the 'Tag table' ⚠️",
                                                            "type": "notify"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "match": {
                                                        "tag": "repeated"
                                                    }
                                                },
                                                {
                                                    "action": [
                                                        {
                                                            "duration": 1000,
                                                            "title": "KNOWN BUG: Tag not possible to be added🦔",
                                                            "type": "notify"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "duration": 1000,
                                                            "type": "wait"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "duration": 1000,
                                                            "title": "if critical, please open an incident",
                                                            "type": "notify"
                                                        }
                                                    ],
                                                    "match": {
                                                        "tag": "bug"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            ],
                                            "type": "switch"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                },

                                        "fontSize": "12px"
                                    }
                                },
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "aggregation": {
                                            "default": "AGG_TYPE_RAW",
                                            "enum": [
                                                "AGG_TYPE_RAW",
                                                "AGG_TYPE_BESTFIT"
                                            ],
                                            "enumNames": [
                                                "RAW",
                                                "BEST FIT"
                                            ],
                                            "title": "Aggregation",
                                            "uniqueItems": true
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "required": [
                                        "aggregation"
                                    ],
                                    "type": "object"
                                },
                                "type": "advancedform",
                                "uiSchema": {
                                    "aggregation": {
                                        "classNames": "styleCustomClass",
                                        "ui:disabled": false,
                                        "ui:options": {
                                            "label": true
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            },
                            {
                                "actions": {
                                    "onClick": {
                                        "id": "tabsID",
                                        "type": "refresh"
                                    }
                                },
                                "captionBar": false,
                                "disabled": "true",
                                "id": "submitFormID",
                                "label": "Submit",
                                "layout": {

                                    "w": 8.933333333333332,
                                    "x": 83.83333333333333,
                                    "y": 4.055
                                },
                                "options": {

                            },
                            {
                                "actions": {

                                            "name": "updateTab",
                                            "type": "action"
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    "reloadFormAndTagSelectors": {
                                        "action": [
                                            {
                                                "id": {
                                                    "route": [
                                                        "tabsID",
                                                        "chartTab",
                                                        "chartWidgetID"
                                                    ]
                                                },
                                                "set": [
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "payload.Start_date",
                                                        "value": "$model.chart.x_axis.0.start_time"
                                                    },
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "payload.End_date",
                                                        "value": "$model.chart.x_axis.0.end_time"
                                                    },
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "payload.tags",
                                                        "value": "$model.chart.pens"
                                                    },
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "payload.Aggregation",
                                                        "value": "$model.chart.pens.0.aggregate"
                                                    }
                                                ],
                                                "type": "modify"
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "id": "startdateFormID",
                                                "set": [
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "model.data.startDate",
                                                        "value": "$payload.Start_date"
                                                    }
                                                ],
                                                "type": "modify"
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "id": "enddateFormID",
                                                "set": [
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "model.data.endDate",
                                                        "value": "$payload.End_date"
                                                    }
                                                ],
                                                "type": "modify"
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "id": "aggregateFormID",
                                                "set": [
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "model.data.aggregation",
                                                        "value": "$payload.Aggregation"
                                                    }
                                                ],
                                                "type": "modify"
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "ctx": "/System/Core/_Global Core Logic/UseCases/Global Core Projects/PMM",
                                                "func": "NormalizedChartPens2Table",
                                                "lib": "bch-pmm-app",
                                                "type": "function"
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "id": "selectedTableID",
                                                "set": [
                                                    {
                                                        "name": "model.data",
                                                        "value": "$payload"
                                                    }
                                                ],
                                                "type": "modify"
                                            }
                                        ],
                                        "type": "delegate"
                                    },
                                    "willRefresh": [
                                        {
                                            "name": "updateTab",
                                            "type": "action"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                },
